name: APT42
akas: Charming Kitten, Mint Sandstorm, TA453, Yellow Garuda (Iran, IRGC)
brief: Used Gemini's text generation/editing to craft phishing material impersonating think-tank staff and for translation/geopolitical research; notably attempted to build a "Data Processing Agent" converting natural-language requests into SQL queries to mine sensitive personal data. GTIG
ttpMd:
**LLM-supported social engineering** T1566 - Phishing

**LLM-informed reconnaissance** T1591 - Gather Victim Org Information

**LLM-enhanced data manipulation** T1213 - Data from Information Repositories (NL-to-SQL agent)
